% 3.2 El Pacifico is on Martinique or costs $175 per night.
% But Regal Park is on Barbados and must cost 175 → so El Pacifico cannot cost 175 → must be on Martinique.
% Enforce: El Pacifico must be on Martinique.
:- resort_island_price(R, I, P), R="El Pacifico", I!="Martinique".

% 3.3 Regal Park is on Martinique or costs $175 per night.
% Regal Park is on Barbados → must cost 175.
:- resort_island_price(R, P, I), R="Regal Park", I="Barbados", P != 175.

:- resort_island_price(R, P, I), R="Grand Echo", P != 215.

% Enforce that Emerald View must cost 235 (from chain: Grand Echo=215 → Emerald View=235)
:- resort_island_price(R, P, I), R="Emerald View", P != 235.
